title: Taxiapp UK Passenger
shortDescription: Driver-owned London black cab booking app with upfront fares, accessible vehicles, and easy ride-hailing.
description:
Taxiapp is a driver-owned London black cab booking application where 100% of the metered fare goes directly to licensed drivers. Users can instantly book or pre-schedule rides, track driver arrival, and travel safely with fully vetted cab drivers.

The app supports 5–6 passenger vehicles, wheelchair accessibility, assistance dogs, and trip sharing for safety. Powered by drivers who completed The Knowledge of London, Taxiapp ensures reliable navigation across the city. A small booking fee applies while keeping the entire fare with the driver.

title: Taxiapp UK Driver
shortDescription: Driver-owned London black taxi app offering profit sharing, voting rights, and flexible job options.
description:
Taxiapp is a driver-focused London black taxi platform designed to give drivers more control and better earnings. Unlike traditional ride-hailing services, drivers keep most of the fare while operating exclusively with licensed black taxis.

As part-owners of the platform, drivers benefit from a profit-sharing model through the Driver Reward Scheme and receive voting rights on major decisions such as commission changes. The app provides flexibility with both pre-booked and e-hail job options, allowing drivers to choose how they work.

Built and operated by cab drivers, Taxiapp aims to strengthen the trade by offering a fair, transparent, and driver-first ecosystem.

title: PayMaya
shortDescription: All-in-one digital wallet and banking app for payments, transfers, savings, and online shopping.
description: PayMaya (now Maya) is an all-in-one digital wallet and banking application that enables users to send money, pay bills, shop online, and manage finances in a single platform. The app supports QR payments, instant transfers, mobile load purchases, and secure online transactions. Users can also access savings features, virtual and physical cards, and other financial services. Designed for convenience and security, PayMaya simplifies everyday financial activities through a modern digital banking experience.

title: Amala Earth
shortDescription: Sustainable shopping app offering eco-friendly products, organic essentials, and conscious lifestyle brands.
description: Amala Earth is a conscious shopping platform featuring over 60,000 eco-friendly products from 400+ homegrown brands. The app offers thoughtfully curated categories including sustainable gift hampers, handcrafted home decor, organic foods, chemical-free beauty products, kids and baby essentials, and herbal wellness supplements. Users can explore artisanal collections such as kansa thali sets, copper drinkware, organic bedding, vegan foods, and natural skincare. Amala Earth promotes mindful living with toxin-free, cruelty-free, and earth-friendly products. The app also provides easy order tracking, exclusive deals, secure payments, and rewards through Earth Seeds for every purchase.

title: Bilddit
shortDescription: On-demand marketplace for building materials with fast delivery and secure online ordering.
description: Bilddit is an online marketplace for building materials, plumbing and heating supplies, and electrical products designed for trade professionals and DIY users. The platform enables users to quickly search for parts, place orders, and receive deliveries in as little as 50 minutes. By eliminating time spent driving, parking, and queuing for materials, Bilddit helps increase productivity and billable hours. The app offers a seamless ordering experience with secure online payments, fast delivery, and convenient access to essential trade supplies, making everyday work easier for professionals.

title: Notebook STORE
shortDescription: One-stop stationery and educational supplies app for students, offices, and institutions.
description: Notebook Store is a one-stop solution for stationery, essential goods, books, and educational toys designed for students, teachers, offices, and businesses. The app provides a wide range of products including notebooks, pens, registers, books, educational toys, and cleaning supplies in a single platform. Users can conveniently browse categories, place orders, and benefit from attractive offers on every purchase. Notebook Store focuses on affordability and convenience, making it easy to access essential school, office, and business supplies from one place.
